title: Defiant (Imperial-class)
content:
{{Top|ga|leg|italics=1|title2=''Imperial''-class}} {{Otheruses|Defiant}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Defiant'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' — Based on standard [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] specifics |line= |model= |type=[[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=1,600 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine=[[Engine/Legends|Equipped]] |hyperdrive=[[Hyperdrive/Legends|Equipped]] |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen=[[Deflector shield generator/Legends|Equipped]] |hull= |sensor=[[Targeting sensor/Legends|Targeting sensors]] |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures=[[Gravitic amplitude modulator]] |armament=*[[Turbolaser/Legends|Turbolaser]] banks *[[Torpedo/Legends|Torpedoes]] *[[Concussion missile/Legends|Concussion missiles]] |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=[[Warship/Legends|Warship]] |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles=*[[Battle of Borosk (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Borosk]] *[[Battle of Yaga Minor (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Yaga Minor]]{{CSWECite|I|179|''Defiant''}} |affiliation=[[Imperial Remnant]] |navy=[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] |fleet= |owners= |captains=[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Essenton]] |crewmembers=[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Arber]] |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|I have a report from Lieutenant Arber, sir. The GAM has been installed in ''Defiant'' and is ready for a test run.''"
"''Excellent. Instruct Lieutenant Arber to forgo the test run and proceed directly to the combat run.|Captain [[Arien Yage]] and Grand Admiral Gilad Pellaeon|}} '''''Defiant''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that served in the [[Imperial Remnant]]'s [[Imperial Navy/Legends|navy]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Essenton]], ''Defiant'' was positioned that [[Standard year/Legends|year]] with other [[Warship/Legends|warships]] of the Imperial Navy near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Borosk/Legends|Borosk]] in a [[Battle of Borosk (Yuuzhan Vong War)|defensive effort]] against an attacking Yuuzhan Vong [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. During the fighting, a [[gravitic amplitude modulator]] was installed upon ''Defiant'', which allowed the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] to disrupt the [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] command signals from the enemy [[yammosk]] war coordinators long enough to smash through disrupted Yuuzhan Vong battle lines and help [[Death/Legends|destroy]] a yammosk. Following a successful defense of Borosk, ''Defiant'' was dispatched to the planet [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]] to fend off an imminent Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of Yaga Minor (Yuuzhan Vong War)|strike]]. ==Description== An [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]], ''Defiant'' measured 1,600 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length and was produced by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. Equipped with [[Engine/Legends|engines]] and a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], ''Defiant'' possessed an armament of [[Torpedo/Legends|torpedoes]], [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]], and [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] banks, with the latter supported by [[Targeting sensor/Legends|targeting sensors]]. The [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] also had a [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]]. For the [[Battle of Borosk (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Borosk]], a [[gravitic amplitude modulator]]—capable of broadcasting [[Gravity/Legends|gravitic]] pulses that interfered with the [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] signals issued by [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[yammosk]] creatures—was installed upon ''Defiant''. ==History== ===Guarding Borosk=== By [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ''Defiant'' was serving in the [[Imperial Remnant]]'s [[Imperial Navy/Legends|fleet]], which oversaw the defense of the Remnant's holdings in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], and was under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Essenton]]. At that [[Time/Legends|time]], [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] was engulfed in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], instigated by the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaders. Although the Imperial Remnant was spared much of the initial assault, a Yuuzhan Vong [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] led by [[B'shith Vorrik]] attacked the Remnant in 28 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]]. The Remnant [[Battle of Bastion|lost]] its [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]], forcing [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] of the Imperial Navy to regroup at the planet [[Borosk/Legends|Borosk]], with ''Defiant'' part of the fleet elements that assembled there. [[File:Yam.jpg|thumb|right|200px|''Defiant'' was responsible for leading the strike that killed a yammosk during the Battle of Borosk.]] As the members of a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] team—who were in the Outer Rim [[Hunt for Zonama Sekot|searching]] for the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] planet [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]—shared intelligence with the Imperials that a modified gravitic amplitude modulator, or GAM, could be used to disrupt the signals of the yammosk war coordinators used by the Yuuzhan Vong, such a device was brought to the [[Borosk system/Legends|Borosk system]] and reprogrammed by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and other members of the Galactic Alliance team. Vorrik and his Yuuzhan Vong forces pursued the Imperials, arriving at Borosk to assault the Remnant, and ''Defiant'' was positioned in low planetary [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] behind layers of [[Ion mine/Legends|ion mines]] that guarded Borosk. However, once the GAM was successfully installed upon ''Defiant'', Pellaeon had [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Arber]] forgo a test run in order to use the GAM against the Yuuzhan Vong immediately, prompting Essenton to take ''Defiant'' away from Borosk and engage the enemy, escorted by [[Blastboat/Legends|blastboats]] and [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. ===Hunting yammosks=== {{Quote|Have ''Stalwart'' press the attack. I'd like to keep their retreat as undignified as possible. And I want ''Relentless'' and ''Protector'' on their way to Yaga Minor immediately. ''Defiant'' and ''Peerless'', too. Flennic is going to need all the help he can get to keep those shipyards safe.|Grand Admiral Pellaeon, after the Battle of Borosk|}} Striking where the Imperials knew a yammosk to be, ''Defiant'' weathered the attacks of the Yuuzhan Vong elements guarding the yammosk and responded in force, with the Star Destroyer's turbolasers eradicating whole [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]]. When the GAM was in range of the yammosk, Arber activated the device, and the resulting jamming of the yammosk's command frequencies caused the coralskippers and other [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] protecting the yammosk to lose a coherent defensive pattern, allowing ''Defiant'' and the ships escorting it to close in on the yammosk and its nearest protectors. In response to the GAM's activation, coralskippers resorted to [[Ramming/Legends|suicide runs]] on ''Defiant''{{'s}} [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]], keeping the Star Destroyer's turbolasers committed to stopping the enemy fighters. Imperial blastboats stationed near ''Defiant'' also aided in defending the [[Warship/Legends|warship]], whittling down passing coralskippers that were too disorganized to go after anything but the Star Destroyer. With TIE fighters strafing the yammosk's vessel, the yammosk attempted a last-ditch effort that saw it detonate two nearby Yuuzhan Vong ships to create a shock wave that sent TIEs spinning and knocked out ''Defiant''{{'s}} targeting [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]]. A recovering TIE fighter was still able to score a direct hit on the yammosk, [[Death/Legends|killing]] the creature, and ''Defiant'' then turned its attention to destroying the remaining Yuuzhan Vong capital ships in the vicinity. When Essenton located another yammosk, Pellaeon gave her permission to use ''Defiant'' to destroy it as well. With Vorrik losing more ships than he intended in the assault, the Yuuzhan Vong commander pulled back his forces from Borosk, and the Imperials harried the retreating vessels while ''Defiant'' used its GAM to confuse fleeing Yuuzhan Vong warships. When the Imperials discovered that a third of the retreating Yuuzhan Vong fleet had split off and was heading for the Imperial Remnant planet [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]], ''Defiant'' and multiple other Imperial [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] were dispatched to aid [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kurlen Flennic]] in defense. ''Defiant'' and the Imperial forces in that area succeeded in driving off the Yuuzhan Vong once again. ==Commanders and crew== {{Quote|And inform Captain Essenton that she is to give Arber her full cooperation. She's a cranky old thing, but when she sees what the GAM can do, I'm sure she'll come around.|Grand Admiral Gilad Pellaeon|}} ''Defiant'' was commanded by the elderly and irritable Captain Essenton, though Pellaeon admired her skill and resolve when commanding ''Defiant'' during the Battle of Borosk. Lieutenant Arber also served on the ship and was responsible for the gravitic amplitude modulator during the fighting at Borosk. ==Behind the scenes== ''Defiant'' appeared in the [[2003]] novel [[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant|''Force Heretic I: Remnant'']], written by [[Sean Williams]] and [[Shane Dix]] as part of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Defiant (Imperium-Klasse) |es=Defiant (clase Imperial) }} [[Category:Imperial-class Star Destroyers]] [[Category:Starships of the Imperial Remnant]]
